rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Presentis', which is clearly legible in the image. Claude-haiku misread it as 'Penultis'.
Selected gemini-flash. Description and amounts (£68 10s 0d) are clearly visible in the image. Gpt-5-mini misread pounds as 60, and claude-haiku completely misaligned, reading 8s 0d.
Selected gemini-flash. Description and amounts (£60 0s 0d) are clearly visible. Claude-haiku misread the pounds amount as 6 shillings.
Selected gemini-flash. Description and amounts (£119 5s 0d) are clearly visible. Claude-haiku was completely misaligned for this entry, showing incorrect description and amounts.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description ('Copons' instead of 'Capon' by gpt-5-mini) and clear amounts (£2 15s 0d). Claude-haiku was misaligned.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amounts (£20 0s 0d). Claude-haiku had a hard rule violation with 20 shillings and was misaligned.
Selected gemini-flash, consistent with gpt-5-mini. Description and amounts (£4 0s 0d) are clearly visible. Claude-haiku was misaligned.
Selected gemini-flash, consistent with gpt-5-mini. Description and amounts (£7 5s 9d) are clearly visible. Claude-haiku was misaligned.

rows.description: Fotherwar pro Dimid: an: ad Fest. Prana
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amounts (£3 0s 0d). Gpt-5-mini's description was significantly different and claude-haiku was misaligned.

Combined gemini-flash's accurate description and pounds/shillings/pence values (£5 10s 8d) with gpt-5-mini's correct identification of the '3/4' fraction symbol. Gemini-flash missed the fraction, while gpt-5-mini had incorrect pound/shilling values. Claude-haiku had a hard rule violation (19 pence) and was misaligned.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description, amounts (£4 11s 8d), and correct identification of the 3/4 fraction symbol. Gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku were significantly incorrect in their amount readings or misalignment.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amounts (£0 16s 1d). Gpt-5-mini had incorrect amounts and description, while claude-haiku had a hard rule violation (16 pence) and was misaligned.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description ('Stives') and amounts (£2 14s 0d). Gpt-5-mini misread the surname as 'Hairs', and claude-haiku had a hard rule violation (14 pence) and was misaligned.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description ('Judy') and amounts (£2 14s 0d). Gpt-5-mini misread the surname as 'Judge', and claude-haiku had a hard rule violation (14 pence) and was misaligned.
Consensus across all extractors for amounts and fraction (£301 11s 2d 0.75). The row is a subtotal with no descriptive text in the image.
Selected gemini-flash, consistent with gpt-5-mini. Description and amounts (£50 0s 0d) are clearly visible. Claude-haiku was misaligned and read an incorrect amount and description.
Consensus across all extractors for amounts (£63 8s 4d). Selected gemini-flash's description for exact match to the image ('Funds' with 's').
Selected gemini-flash. The shillings column in the image clearly shows '0' (a dash), while gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku misread it as '8'.
Selected gemini-flash, consistent with gpt-5-mini. The description 'Recepta Varia' is clearly visible as a header. Claude-haiku was misaligned.

rows.description: 1784 Sept 12 of Mr Wm Bowler 3 years Rent for Longworth.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash, as it alone accurately captured the full description, including the date, correct number of years, and amounts (£175 0s 0d). Other extractors were misaligned or provided incomplete/incorrect descriptions.

rows.description: Apl. 2 of Mr— Knowles payment of D. Shotridge Benefit
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amounts (£110 0s 0d). The 'Apl. 2' is clearly visible in the margin. Other extractors misread description significantly.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amounts (£10 0s 0d). The '2' in the margin is a notation and not part of the description, as correctly noted by gemini-flash (though it misread the '2' as '7' in its note). Other extractors misread the description and integrated the marginalia.

rows.description: of Mr Bowles 2 years Rent for Longworth to Bricklett

rows.description: Norton Estate from Mich. 1782 to Mich 1783.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate description of the header text and dates. Gpt-5-mini misread the estate name and dates. Claude-haiku was completely misaligned.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and embedded amounts (£265 0s 0d). Gpt-5-mini misread 'Gross' as 'Money'. Claude-haiku was misaligned.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and embedded amounts (£6 10s 0d). Gpt-5-mini misread 'Ch. Dº.' as 'Cera De'. Claude-haiku was misaligned.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate representation of the subtotal line, which has no description text in the image. Gpt-5-mini invented a description ('Allowd Ditto'). Claude-haiku was misaligned.

Selected gemini-flash, which correctly identified this as a description-only line, with the associated amount appearing on the subsequent line. Other extractors were misaligned or merged entries incorrectly.

Selected gemini-flash, which correctly extracted the embedded amount (£33 3s 0d) for the preceding 'Allowed Dilaps.' entry, with a blank description. Gpt-5-mini effectively merged this with another description, and claude-haiku was misaligned.

Selected gemini-flash, which correctly identified this as a description-only line for 'Land Tax', with the associated amount appearing on the subsequent line. Other extractors were misaligned or merged information incorrectly.

Selected gemini-flash, which correctly extracted the embedded amount '10 ½' as 10 shillings and 0.5 fraction for the preceding 'Land Tax' entry, with a blank description. Gpt-5-mini missed this as a distinct row, and claude-haiku was misaligned.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description ('Houses') and embedded amounts (£16 7s 10d) with correct 0.5 fraction. Gpt-5-mini misread 'Houses' as 'Closes'. Claude-haiku misread 'Houses' as 'Roses' and the fraction as 0.75.
Selected gemini-flash, consistent with gpt-5-mini, for accurate embedded amounts (£49 10s 10d) and correct 0.5 fraction. Claude-haiku misread the fraction as 0.75.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description ('Rem: to Land') and embedded amounts (£222 9s 0d). The row type is 'total' as it represents a remainder or subtotal. Gpt-5-mini misread the description. Claude-haiku misread the description and type.
Consensus across all extractors for amounts (£222 9s 0d). This line is a restatement of the 'Remainder' amount, aligned in the main columns, with no descriptive text.
Selected gemini-flash, consistent with gpt-5-mini. This is the final grand total of (£829 9s 0d) clearly visible in the image. Claude-haiku missed this final row.
